revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Automatic wikipedia redirects" to "Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects"

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Fujioka); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fujioka here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
